scripts.dev: echo 'Choose a specific dev command: dev:backend, dev:web, or dev:mobile'
scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:web
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:web && bun run test:mobile
scripts.lint: bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:web && bun run lint:mobile
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/node_modules web/node_modules backend/.next web/.next mobile/build
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd mobile && flutter pub get
